name: Halo Laboratory-Grown Diamond Pendant
description: A consultation-led halo laboratory-grown diamond pendant designed for buyers who want clear laboratory-grown diamond origin disclosure, certification guidance, and metal purity clarity before purchase.

details.mainStone: 0.65 Carat Centre Laboratory-Grown Diamond with Halo
details.growthMethod: CVD or HPHT to be confirmed before purchase
details.metalHallmark: BIS hallmarking to be confirmed for gold settings

dimensions: Final dimensions depend on selected stone, size, and setting. Confirm during consultation.
careInstructions: Avoid harsh chemicals, ultrasonic cleaning without guidance, and impact. Store separately and request professional inspection for prongs and clasps.
uniqueFeatures: Made for transparent shortlisting: origin disclosure, certificate discussion, metal clarity, quote confirmation, and WhatsApp-led buying guidance.
leadTime: 7-21 days after design and payment confirmation
